---
name: Feature request
about: New capability or enhancement
labels: enhancement
---

## Use case

<!-- One paragraph: the operational need. What were you trying to do
     when you realized the feature didn't exist?
     "I wanted to X but there's no way to Y" beats "I think Z would be
     nice". -->

## Proposed shape

<!-- Optional · skip if you're flagging the need without committing
     to a design.
     If you have an idea: rough API / UI / config-knob shape. The
     reviewer will iterate on it before code lands. -->

## Trigger

<!-- Forward-looking ROADMAP items each have a "trigger" · the operator
     signal that justifies starting the work. State yours:
     - frequency: "I hit this every scope I create" / "once per quarter"
     - cost-of-workaround: "I script it externally" / "I edit manifest by hand"
     - blocking: "this blocks <use case>" / "nice-to-have"
-->

## Stage tag

<!-- Map to the plan if possible:
     - A-G: original Stage A-G items (most shipped, but maintenance
       items still possible)
     - H1-H15: UI/UX innovations
     - I1-I22: backend features (I10/I23/I25 explicitly excluded)
     - J1-J5: workers
     - K: weaksecrets
     - C1-C11: forward-looking opportunistic (see ROADMAP.md)
-->

## Out of scope

<!-- Anything you'd hate to see bundled with this feature. Helps the
     PR stay focused. -->
